select.value: Select DISTINCT A.BONUS_TYPE_ID ,B.BONUS_TYPE_NM , A.BRANCH_ORG_ID , C.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,A.CHANNLE_ID ,D.CHANNLE_NM , A.PRICE , A.EFF_FLAG from IBS.T3_SIGN_PROD_PRICE A LEFT JOIN IBS.T9_BONUS_TYPE B ON A.BONUS_TYPE_ID=B.BONUS_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG C ON A.BRANCH_ORG_ID=C.ORG_ID AND ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' LEFT JOIN IBS.T9_CHANNEL D ON A.CHANNLE_ID=D.CHANNLE_ID WHERE A.EFF_FLAG='1' and {#condition#} ORDER BY A.BONUS_TYPE_ID, A.BRANCH_ORG_ID, CHANNLE_ID

option.source: @{select distinct BONUS_TYPE_ID , BONUS_TYPE_NM from IBS.T9_BONUS_TYPE WHERE BONUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN ('01', '02') ORDER BY BONUS_TYPE_ID}
option.label: BONUS_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT OU_CD AS BRANCH_ORG_ID , OU_NM FROM dim.DIM_OU_DTIL WHERE PRN_OU_SUR_ID='200000019420110101' AND SUBSTR(OU_CD,3,2)='00' ORDER BY OU_CD}
option.label: OU_NM

option.source: @{select distinct CHANNLE_ID, CHANNLE_NM from IBS.T9_CHANNEL ORDER BY CHANNLE_ID}
option.label: CHANNLE_NM
